required_skills: High-poly character sculpting in ZBrush for human anatomy, creature forms, and costume/armor detail at AAA quality standards
Retopology and low-poly mesh creation for game-ready characters with clean deformation-friendly edge flow
PBR character texturing including skin shading, fabric, metal, and organic material authoring in Substance Painter
High-to-low poly baking pipelines including normal, curvature, thickness, and ambient occlusion map generation for characters
UV unwrapping and UV space prioritization for character assets balancing texel density across body, face, and costume regions
Strong foundational knowledge of human anatomy, figure proportion, facial structure, and clothing silhouette for believable character creation
LOD generation and mesh optimization for characters targeting real-time engine polygon and texture memory budgets
Game engine integration including material setup, LOD assignment, and in-engine visual validation in Unreal Engine or Unity
preferred_skills: Hair and fur grooming for real-time characters using XGen, Ornatrix, or Unreal Groom with strand-based hair systems
Facial blend shape and morph target creation for expressive character animation pipelines
Cloth and accessory simulation-ready mesh setup for real-time cloth physics integration
Photorealistic character creation using photogrammetry reference and multi-view capture pipelines in RealityCapture
Stylized character art for non-photorealistic games including cartoon shading, exaggerated proportion design, and hand-painted texture styles
Concept-to-3D interpretation skills for translating 2D character designs from concept artists into production 3D with minimal direction
Experience delivering hero and background character tiers at differentiating quality levels within a single project's art pipeline
responsibilities: Sculpt and develop hero and background characters from concept art reference in ZBrush, delivering high-poly meshes with anatomy accuracy, costume detail, and surface complexity appropriate to character tier
Retopologize high-poly character sculpts into clean, deformation-ready low-poly game meshes with animator-compliant edge flow across face, hands, and body joint regions
Author full PBR texture sets for characters in Substance Painter covering skin subsurface scattering setups, fabric weave patterns, metal surface wear, and emissive elements
Execute character baking pipelines in Marmoset Toolbag, producing clean normal, AO, curvature, and thickness maps free from projection errors or cage artifacts
Optimize character assets to meet project polygon budgets and texture memory allocations, generating LOD chains and validating deformation quality at each LOD level
Set up and groom real-time hair assets using XGen or Unreal Groom, producing strand-based hair cards that achieve visual quality targets within GPU performance budgets
Integrate completed characters into Unreal Engine or Unity, configuring master material instances, validating under in-game lighting rigs, and resolving any visual discrepancies from approved concept
Collaborate with rigging and animation teams to ensure mesh topology supports clean deformation during facial performance capture and full-body motion capture data retargeting
Participate in character art reviews presenting work-in-progress at sculpt, retopology, texture, and engine-integration milestones for art director and lead feedback
Maintain thorough asset documentation including naming conventions, texture packing layouts, and material setup guides to support downstream pipeline users and QA
